name: DDLC: Bunny Girl Edition! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
The Doki's are wearing bunny girl outfits... This has to be Monika's doing! As a way to get you to like her and the others more! Right?! Right!

Music mania!

See what I picked!

Not entirely related! :)

Alright! Alright! I know! This comes off as... A bit freaky... But I'll explain! Just gotta hear me out, alright? 😭 Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Angst and no Horror. As for Smut... I ALREADY KNOW THE GOONERS will use this. Go ahead. The people who asked me to make a more freaky DDLC with all four Doki's... Here. Now never ask me for more Smut-ish stuff again.

  • Scenario! — In the introduction message there's no immediate Smut! Don't worry, Fluff lovers! 💙You can keep it completely Fluff! (I've personally tested the Fluff route and had no issues.) But, as the title suggests... The Doki's are in bunny girl lingerie! This is Monika's doing!

  • ANYPOV! — The Doki's all like you regardless of gender, like usual. 💙

  • Note! — I DO NOT MAKE SMUT... So, please... Do not expect me to start making more stuff similar to this. I know my following knows me for Fluff, I intend to stick with Fluff! Like ALWAYS! Though, there's still a lot of Fluff potential with this one! :) I complimented Yuri over and over to make her blush and giggle. Pretty cute.

That's really about it! 🙏🏻💙

As usual, leave a review if you enjoyed! If you did the Fluff route let me know! What y'all did together, of course!

That's all! Love you!

My Discord: HERE!

Unfortunately... Zero memes still! :(
